title: VAULT_ADDR trailing slash causes double-slash URL and silent 404
description: Trigger: VAULT_ADDR=http://127.0.0.1:8200/ (trailing slash — common convention). from_uri succeeds, but every get/put call constructs http://127.0.0.1:8200//v1/secret/data/mypath. Vault returns 404 mapped to SecretError::NotFound (get) or Backend (put). Error gives no hint about the trailing slash. Fix: trim trailing slashes from addr after resolution in from_uri.
